title: Director of Teaching & Learning K-12
notes: District has its own preschool (Bryan City Schools Preschool). Cox owns K-12 curriculum and would lead any ECE curriculum adoption. Email format first.last@bryanschools.net confirmed via district directory. Assistant Superintendent Chad Bassett also a fallback.

title: Executive Director of Teaching & Learning / Chief of Academic Affairs
notes: District approved new reading curriculum (April 2023). Recently partnered with Neighborhood Bridges (Aug 2025) and a tutoring service (Feb 2025) - signals investment in instructional support. Orrenmaa is Title IX coordinator and oversees K-12 curriculum including elementary.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small district (757 students, 4 schools) in Middlefield. No dedicated curriculum director identified; preschool program runs via ESC Western Reserve. Superintendent is appropriate ECE decision-maker. Email format first.last@cardinalschools.org is inferred standard district pattern - confidence Medium.

title: Superintendent
notes: Very small district in Cedarville (Greene County) - no dedicated curriculum director. Masser took over as superintendent Nov 2023. Email format inferred (first-initial+last@cedarcliffschools.net) - confidence Medium. Elementary Principal Jamie Dean is fallback.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small district (1,264 students, 3 schools) in Warren. No dedicated curriculum director found in public directory; Director of Pupil Services Christy Pompoco handles special ed. Superintendent Jason Gray is appropriate ECE point. Email not surfaced publicly - check Apollo.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small rural Scioto County district (~600 students, 4 administrators). No dedicated curriculum director - Superintendent Warnock is the appropriate ECE decision-maker. Note: district moved domain from clay.k12.oh.us to claylocalschools.org.

title: Superintendent
notes: Elementary runs preschool through grade 5. No dedicated curriculum director surfaced; superintendent David Moss (3rd year) handles district decisions. Curriculum department listed in Central Office but no named director.

title: Superintendent
notes: Wingler took over Aug 1 (2024), replacing retiring Graig Bansek - leadership transition signal. District operates Little Raiders Preschool. Email format last+first-initial@columbia.k12.oh.us inferred from district pattern - confidence Medium.

title: Superintendent / Junior-Senior High Principal (interim)
notes: LEADERSHIP TRANSITION: Eding became superintendent Feb 2 (2026), replacing retired Danny Kissell. Serving as both principal and super through July 31, 2026, then super-only with 3-yr contract through 2029. Small district - super is appropriate ECE point. Elementary Principal Tracy Potts is also a fallback.

title: Director of K-12 Curriculum & Technology
notes: Small Miami County district (~850-900 students). Sagona owns K-12 curriculum. Email format last+first-initial@covingtonk12.org confirmed via multiple staff in ZoomInfo. District accepted federal grants and moved forward with LifeWise program.

title: Superintendent
notes: NEW LEADERSHIP: Curtis started Aug 1, 2024 from Windham Schools (was assistant super at Streetsboro, prior curriculum consultant at Portage/Cuyahoga ESCs). Strong ECE/curriculum background. Email inferred first-initial+last@crestwoodschools.org pattern - confidence Medium.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small lakeside district (544 students, 3 schools) - no dedicated curriculum director. Buehler holds M.Ed. and is the appropriate ECE decision-maker. Listed in Ohio DOE Future Forward Ohio spotlight - district active in state innovation programs.

title: Director of Elementary Curriculum and Assessment
notes: District has split curriculum directors: Uher (Elementary) and Aaron Cook (Secondary). Uher is the right ECE/PreK contact. Note district email domain is delawarecityschools.net (not dcs.k12.oh.us).

title: Federal Programs, Curriculum & Testing Administrator
notes: District uses domain eastholmes.org for email (website is .k12.oh.us). Wilson owns curriculum + Title I + federal funds - strong fit for ECE outreach given Title I funds often support PreK. Email format first-initial+last inferred from ZoomInfo pattern.

title: Superintendent
notes: Eastern Local (Brown County, Sardinia). Small rural district - no dedicated curriculum director. Michael is current superintendent (replacing Michele Filon). Email not surfaced publicly - check Apollo for jmichael@easternlocal.com pattern.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small district (544 students). Wilhelm promoted to superintendent Aug 2024 from MS/HS principal role - leadership transition. No dedicated curriculum director. Email format first-initial+last@edgerton.k12.oh.us inferred - confidence Medium.

title: Director of Curriculum, Federal Programs and Assessments
notes: Sites holds combined curriculum + federal programs role - ideal ECE contact since Title I often funds PreK. District near Lima (Allen County).

title: Superintendent
notes: Small district (569 students, PK-12) in Sidney/Shelby County. No dedicated curriculum director; Holtzapple hired March 2022. Single-building PK-12 setup, so superintendent owns ECE decisions.

title: Elementary Principal (also handles district curriculum oversight in small district)
notes: District has a Director of Curriculum & Instruction page but specific name not surfaced publicly. Elementary Principal Aric Fiscus (6th yr) is the most likely day-to-day ECE contact for this small Brown County district. Check Apollo for current curriculum director name.

title: Director of Curriculum and Special Education
notes: Honaker presented instructional materials for 2026 board adoption - active curriculum buying signal. District uses email domain fortfrye.org (not .k12.oh.us). Email format first-initial+last inferred from confirmed staff pattern - confidence Medium.

title: Assistant Superintendent
notes: Mid-sized Muskingum County district (~1,854 students, 7 schools). Preston is Assistant Superintendent - likely owns curriculum & instruction. Specific email not surfaced via search. District general email: info@franklinlocalschools.org. Check Apollo for rpreston@franklinlocalschools.org pattern.

title: Director of Instructional Services / Curriculum
notes: District uses unique email format gl_+first-initial+last@gallialocal.org (confirmed via superintendent Phil Kuhn = gl_pkuhn). Strong direct curriculum lead. ~430 staff.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small district (813 students, 3 schools, only 1 district admin). Murray current super (replaced Tom Pfeiffer). No dedicated curriculum director - super is the right contact. Email format first-initial+last@gibsonburg.k12.oh.us inferred.

title: Superintendent
notes: Ashtabula County. Discussed moving HS Principal Roberta Cozad to curriculum coordinator (June 2024 board meeting) - potential ECE-adjacent role in transition. Superintendent William Nye is primary contact. Email not surfaced publicly - check Apollo.

title: Superintendent
notes: District has Division of Curriculum, Instruction & Assessment but no named curriculum director surfaced - assistant principals (e.g. Todd Dunlap) handle instructional tech/assessment. Superintendent is best district-level ECE contact.

title: Superintendent
notes: District uses email domain hillsboro-indians.org (not hcs-k12.org). Curriculum Specialist Shelly Beumer is a building-level resource, not district director. Recent early childhood principal hire: Taylor Jodrey at Hillsboro Elementary.

title: Superintendent
notes: 1,739 students, 3 schools, only 2 district admins. Wendy Hendrix listed as EMIS Coordinator & Curriculum Secretary (not a director). No dedicated curriculum director - superintendent is appropriate contact. Email not surfaced - check Apollo.

title: Curriculum Coordinator
notes: Wintersville/Jefferson County district. NOTE: Jolene Miller at @ictwolves.com is an Illinois district (not this one). Nicole McDonald is current Indian Creek OH curriculum coordinator. Email not publicly surfaced - check Apollo. Superintendent T.C. Chappelear, Ed.D. is alternate contact.

title: Superintendent
notes: NEW LEADERSHIP: Huber appointed full superintendent May 2025 with 5-yr contract (was interim after John Montanaro resigned). 16-yr district employee. Note: William Mullane is Supervisor of School Improvement at both JALSD and Ashtabula County ESC - dual role. Email format first.last@jalsd.org confirmed (e.g., steve.candela@jalsd.org).

title: Superintendent
notes: Small Trumbull County district. Baldwin started as superintendent April 2024 - leadership transition. Worked in district since 2002. No dedicated curriculum director - super is the right contact. Email format first-initial+last@badgerbraves.org inferred. General district contact: boe@badgerbraves.org.

title: Principal, Kenton Elementary (PreK-2)
notes: Hardin County district. Kenton Elementary is PreK-2 building - Butterman directly oversees early childhood/PreK. District has a Director of Curriculum, Instruction and Assessment position but specific name not surfaced. Check Apollo for both Butterman email and the named curriculum director.

title: Superintendent
notes: Lake Local (Wood County, Millbury) - 1,581 students, 3 schools. NEW LEADERSHIP: Cooper hired May 2024, started after Jim Witt retired (18 years). Major leadership transition signal. No dedicated curriculum director found. Email not surfaced - check Apollo for mcooper@lakeschools.org pattern.

title: Superintendent
notes: Henry County, ~1,100 students PreK-12 in single K-12 facility. PK-4 elementary led by Principal Allison Postl. Peters is district-level decision-maker for ECE. Note district website is libertycenterschools.org (not libertycenter.k12.oh.us).

title: Director of Curriculum & Instruction (7-12)
notes: District migrated from lickingvalley.k12.oh.us to lvschools.us domain. Warren handles 7-12 curriculum specifically. For PK-6, Director of Student Services Tiffany Schmitz may be alternate contact. Email format first-initial+last@lvschools.us inferred. Superintendent Scott Beery is alternate.

title: Director of Curriculum and Instruction
notes: Henderson is the named curriculum director. Superintendent Jennifer L. Allerding is alternate. Email format first-initial+last@lpschools.k12.oh.us inferred from district pattern - confidence Medium.

title: Assistant Superintendent (Curriculum)
notes: Larger district (~3,750 students, 9 schools, PK-12) in Riverside/Dayton. Wagner runs the Curriculum Department and is Civil Rights Coordinator. Strong direct fit. Superintendent Chad Wyen previously held the curriculum role himself (2014-present).

title: Director of Curriculum
notes: Grigsby has been Director of Curriculum since 2012; recognized as Ohio finalist for Presidential Award of Excellence in Math/Science Teaching. Strong long-tenured curriculum lead.

title: Curriculum Director
notes: STRONG ECE/LITERACY SIGNAL: District featured in Fordham Institute report on Science of Reading implementation. Allocated 70%+ of $1.7M pandemic funds to literacy curriculum/training. Johnson is the named curriculum director who led this work. Email format last+first-initial inferred - confidence Medium. Superintendent Ed Kurt is alternate.

title: Director of Teaching and Learning
notes: District email domain is maumeek12.org (NOT maumee.k12.oh.us per ZoomInfo). Shafer holds M.Ed from BGSU, on CREATE! Advisory Board for regional PD. NOTE: Preschool is operated by ESC-LEW (Educational Service Center of Lake Erie West) on Maumee's behalf. Director of Educational Services Tricia Samuel is alternate for special needs/early intervention.

title: Director of Curriculum & Federal Programs
notes: Barnett owns curriculum + federal programs - ideal for ECE outreach (Title I funds often back PreK). Note: Superintendent Scot Gheen is outgoing; Shawn Bush is incoming. Email format first-initial+last@meigslocal.org inferred from district pattern.
